svg.text: Spec-driven, guardrailed, cost-capped. Control plane on GitHub runners; Azure is the deploy target only.
GATE: blocks push if spec malformed
LAYER 2 · GitHub Control Plane (Ephemeral Runner — the brain runs here)
GitHub-Hosted Runner VM (timeout guard active · per-run token budget)
LAYER 3 · LLM Reasoning + Guardrails (every call passes through here)
LAYER 4 · Azure Target (passive deploy recipient — Role 3)
LAYER 5 · Observability and Memory — PHASE 2 / OPTIONAL (dashed = build later)
Numbered badges = execution step order. Solid arrows = MVP flow. Dashed = Phase-2 / optional.
Primary loop guard = max_iterations (logical, keeps logs). Wall-clock timeout = backstop only.
